evidence.quote_or_summary: There are two distinct seasons for the Everest Base Camp (classic route) trek – April (Spring) and October (Autumn)

values: Spring (April) is moist with slightly warmer daytime temperatures and possible snow patches above 12,000 feet
Autumn (October) is dry and crisp with no snow on the trek and colder nights

evidence.quote_or_summary: While Spring is moist, Autumn is dry and crisp.
you will still find snow patches on the ground above 12,000 feet

values: Snow patches may be present on the trail in Spring (April), generally above 12,000 feet
No snow on the trek in Autumn (October)

evidence.quote_or_summary: Presence of snow: You may find snow patches on the trail.
Presence of snow: You will not find snow at this time of the year.
you will still find snow patches on the ground above 12,000 feet

values: Spring (April): rain or sun behind clouds can drop daytime temperature to around 12 °C
Autumn (October): rain or slight drizzle brings down daytime temperature by a few degrees

evidence.quote_or_summary: During the day if the sun goes behind the clouds and there is about of rain, then the temperature can fall to around 12 °C.
any rain or slight drizzle brings down the temperature by a few degrees

values: Spring (April) daytime: 18 °C to 24 °C; nighttime: 5 °C to 0 °C; 4 warm layers required
Autumn (October) daytime: 12 °C to 15 °C; nighttime: -5 °C to -10 °C; 5 warm layers required

evidence.quote_or_summary: Day time: Between 18 °C and 24 °C | Night time: Will drop to temperatures between 5 °C and 0 °C.
No. of warm layers required: 4 warm layers
Day time: Between 12 °C and 15 °C | Night time: Will drop to temperatures between -5 °C and -10 °C.
No. of warm layers required: 5 warm layers

values: Spring (April): rain or cloud cover can drop daytime temperature to around 12 °C
Autumn (October): nights are chilly, dipping to -5 °C; rain/drizzle lowers daytime temperature; keep a jacket handy

evidence.quote_or_summary: During the day if the sun goes behind the clouds and there is about of rain, then the temperature can fall to around 12 °C.
Nights in Autumn get chilly. In October the temperature dips to -5 ° C.
So keep a jacket handy with you always.
